title: tagetes argentina
intro: Tagetes argentina, also known as Argentine marigold or sweet-scented marigold, is a plant species within the daisy family, characterized by its bright yellow and orange flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Tagetes argentina include its potential to reduce anxiety and stress, promote digestion, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of Tagetes argentina can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, and are often used to treat various health conditions, including skin issues and respiratory problems.
